rules: Headings over 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do NOT use Inter or generic sans for headings.
H1 size max text-6xl, fluid scaling.
Primary CTA MUST be the Smoky BBQ Red/Amber (#D84B20).
Never use pure black or pure white.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID for Photo Gallery. Asymmetry, visual tension.
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Generous Spacing Philosophy: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Grid Layouts MUST only have direct children.

hero.instruction: Massive Bebas Neue heading. Parallax scroll effect if possible.

navigation.instruction: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with 1px delicate inner stroke border-white/10. Sticky top.

menu_section.instruction: Use Shadcn Tabs for Categories. Do not use generic cards. Go cardless or use sharp-edged flat surfaces.

forms.instruction: Use customized Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Solid dark background for inputs, thin amber borders on focus.

hero_background.description: Grilled meat on black grill, perfect for dark smoky background

gallery_2.description: Close up of steak on grill

about_interior_1.description: Cozy log cabin restaurant interior warm

rules: Hero image must have bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text contrast.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY for premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Subtle scale up for gallery images.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). No 'all'.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page app with smooth scroll using React + Tailwind + Shadcn.
Include both a contact form and a reservation form.
Use real reviews: Michael Mclaurin, The High Church THC, Demetria Green.
Menu must include: Ribs, Brisket, Pulled Pork, Chicken, Sandwiches, Sides, Desserts, Drinks (use demo data for items).
Vibe: Rustic/smoky BBQ vibe (warm woods, charred textures, amber/red).
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn Dropdown/Select and Calendar/Datepicker.
